name: Golden Arrow
short_description: A 2d puzzle game in a world of arrows!
detailed_description:
A 2d puzzle game in a world of arrows! It's a sokoban-like block pushing game with a simple twist; Instead of boxes, you have to deal with arrows that move toward their pointed directions. You play as a single arrow whose goal is to move all the colored arrows to their corresponding goals. The colored arrows move forward if nothing's in the way, and stop if an object blocks their path (except for some specific circumstances...). A seemingly simple world hides a complex mechanism that gradually reveals itself as you progress further.

Every level contains a unique challenge that will deepen your understanding of the game and equip you with new skills. If you love puzzle games like Stephen's Sausage Roll, Snakebird or Jelly No Puzzle then this is for you :)

Become an arrow and help your fellow arrows get to their goal. Play with your friends and family and try to make it to the end!

Notes:

  • There are a total of 82 levels/puzzles in the game.

  • The game only supports Windows.

  • Notes on the Demo: The demo has six levels. Only the last level is included in the full game. The rest are exclusive to the demo.

Follow me on social media for news, updates, and behind-the-scenes :)

Instagram / Twitter / Bluesky: @dongchagames
